title: Riemann Hypothesis via Warped Stationarity вҖ” Proof DAG
description: Every zero of the Hardy Z-function is real.

ax:Z.name: Hardy Z-function
ax:Z.statement: Z(t) вү” eвҒұбөӣвҒҪбө—вҒҫ О¶(ВҪ+it), where П‘(t) вү” arg О“(Вј + itвҒ„2) вҲ’ (tвҒ„2) log ПҖ. Z is real on в„қ; |Z(t)| = |О¶(ВҪ+it)|; zeros of Z on в„қ coincide with zeros of О¶ on ВҪ+iв„қ.
ax:Z.source: Edwards, Riemann's Zeta Function, В§6.5; Titchmarsh Ch. 2

ax:ПҲasymp.name: Digamma asymptotic
ax:ПҲasymp.statement: As |t| вҶ’ вҲһ with t вҲҲ в„қ, ВҪ в„ңПҲ(Вј+itвҒ„2) = ВҪ log|tвҒ„2| + рқ“һ(|t|вҒ»ВІ). Consequently П‘вҖІ(t) = ВҪ log|tвҒ„(2ПҖ)| + рқ“һ(|t|вҒ»ВІ) вҶ’ +вҲһ.
ax:ПҲasymp.source: Olver, Asymptotics and Special Functions, Ch. 8 В§4

ax:HL.name: HardyвҖ“Littlewood second moment
ax:HL.statement: вҲ«вӮҖбөҖ |О¶(ВҪ+it)|ВІ dt = T log(TвҒ„(2ПҖ)) + (2ОівӮ‘ вҲ’ 1) T + рқ“һ(TВ№бҗҹВІ log T), where ОівӮ‘ is the EulerвҖ“Mascheroni constant.

ax:RS.name: RiemannвҖ“Siegel formula
ax:RS.statement: For t > 0: Z(t) = 2 вҲ‘вӮҷвӮҢвӮҒбҙәвҒҪбө—вҒҫ nвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ cos(П‘(t) вҲ’ t log n) + R(t), where N(t) вү” вҢҠвҲҡ(tвҒ„(2ПҖ))вҢӢ and R(t) = рқ“һ(tвҒ»В№бҗҹвҒҙ) with (dвҒ„dt) arg R(t) = рқ“һ(tвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ).
ax:RS.source: Edwards В§7.4; Gabcke (1979) Satz 7.1; Berry (1995) Proc. Roy. Soc. A 450

ax:Wiener29.name: Wiener's Theorem 29
ax:Wiener29.statement: For f вҲҲ Lбө–вӮ—вӮ’б¶ң(в„қ) with p = 2 and time-average covariance cкң°(О·) вү” lim рқ‘ҲвҶ’вҲһ рқ‘ҲвҒ»В№ вҲ«вӮҖбөҒ f(u) fМ„(u+О·) du existing, positive-definite, and continuous at 0, the Bochner spectral measure Ој[f] defined by cкң°(О·) = вҲ« eвҒұбө‘бөқ dОј[f](ОІ) satisfies Ој[f](E) = lim рқ‘ҮвҶ’вҲһ (2ПҖвҒ„T) вҲ«вӮ‘ |(2ПҖ)вҒ»В№ вҲ«вӮҖбөҖ f(u) eвҒ»вҒұбөҗбөҳ du|ВІ dm for every bounded Borel set E вҠӮ в„қ.

ax:PW.name: PaleyвҖ“Wiener for WSS functions with compactly supported spectrum
ax:PW.statement: If f вҲҲ LВІвӮ—вӮ’б¶ң(в„қ) has Bochner spectral measure Ој[f] with supp Ој[f] вҠҶ [вҲ’П„, П„], then f extends to an entire function on в„Ӯ of exponential type вүӨ П„ satisfying |f(z)| вүӨ вҲҡ(Ој[f](в„қ)) В· eбө—|бөҺб¶»|.
ax:PW.source: Yaglom, Correlation Theory, Vol. I, Thm. 4.7.3; BochnerвҖ“Phillips, Ann. Math. 43 (1942), 409вҖ“418

ax:Akhiezer.name: AkhiezerвҖ“LaguerreвҖ“PГіlya criterion
ax:Akhiezer.statement: If F вҲ¶ в„Ӯ вҶ’ в„Ӯ is an entire function of exponential type вүӨ П„ which is real on в„қ and whose autocorrelation measure Ој[F] (from c[F]) is finite, non-negative, and supported in [вҲ’2П„, 2П„], then F вҲҲ рқ“ӣрқ“ҹ (LaguerreвҖ“PГіlya class) and every zero of F is real.
ax:Akhiezer.source: Akhiezer, Theory of Approximation, В§V.4; Levin, Lectures on Entire Functions, Lecture 16, Theorem 3

def:Оҳ.name: Shifted phase Оҳ
def:Оҳ.statement: Оҳ(t) вү” П‘(t) + c t, where c is a real parameter with c > cвӢҶ вү” вҲ’inf П‘вҖІ(в„қ) (i.e. c exceeds minus the infimum of П‘вҖІ over в„қ).

lem:c*.name: cвӢҶ is finite
lem:c*.statement: cвӢҶ вү” вҲ’inf П‘вҖІ(в„қ) lies in (0, вҲһ).
lem:c*.proof: П‘вҖІ is continuous on в„қ. By ax:ПҲasymp, П‘вҖІ(t) вҶ’ +вҲһ as |t| вҶ’ вҲһ. A continuous function on в„қ tending to +вҲһ at infinity attains a finite infimum.

lem:Оҳdiffeo.name: Оҳ is a CвҲһ bijection в„қ вҶ’ в„қ with ОҳвҖІ > 0
lem:Оҳdiffeo.statement: For c > cвӢҶ, Оҳ is smooth with ОҳвҖІ(t) = П‘вҖІ(t) + c > 0 for every t вҲҲ в„қ; Оҳ вҲ¶ в„қ вҶ’ в„қ is a CвҲһ diffeomorphism.
lem:Оҳdiffeo.proof: c > cвӢҶ = вҲ’inf П‘вҖІ gives П‘вҖІ + c > 0 on в„қ. Strict monotonicity combined with Оҳ(ВұвҲһ) = ВұвҲһ gives bijectivity. The inverse function theorem gives smoothness of ОҳвҒ»В№.

def:Y.name: Unwarped function Y
def:Y.statement: Y вҲ¶ в„қ вҶ’ в„қ,  Y(u) вү” Z(ОҳвҒ»В№(u)) вҒ„ вҲҡ(ОҳвҖІ(ОҳвҒ»В№(u))).

lem:Zfact.name: Pointwise factorization Z = вҲҡОҳвҖІ В· YвҲҳОҳ
lem:Zfact.statement: For every t вҲҲ в„қ, Z(t) = вҲҡ(ОҳвҖІ(t)) В· Y(Оҳ(t)).
lem:Zfact.proof: Set u вү” Оҳ(t). Then ОҳвҒ»В№(u) = t and ОҳвҖІ(ОҳвҒ»В№(u)) = ОҳвҖІ(t). By def:Y, Y(Оҳ(t)) = Y(u) = Z(t) вҒ„ вҲҡ(ОҳвҖІ(t)). Multiply both sides by вҲҡ(ОҳвҖІ(t)).

lem:П‘''.name: П‘вҖі > 0 on (0, вҲһ)
lem:П‘''.statement: П‘вҖі(t) > 0 for every t > 0. In particular, П‘вҖІ is strictly increasing on (0, вҲһ).
lem:П‘''.proof: П‘вҖі(t) = вҲ’Вј в„‘ ПҲвҖІ(Вј+itвҒ„2). The series ПҲвҖІ(w) = вҲ‘вӮ–вүҘвӮҖ (w+k)вҒ»ВІ gives, for w = Вј+itвҒ„2 with t > 0, в„‘(w+k)вҒ»ВІ = вҲ’2(Вј+k)(tвҒ„2) |w+k|вҒ»вҒҙ < 0. Hence вҲ’Вј в„‘ПҲвҖІ(Вј+itвҒ„2) > 0.

lem:Пүbound.name: Instantaneous frequency ratio ПүвӮҷ вҲҲ [0, 1)
lem:Пүbound.statement: For every n вүҘ 1, every c > cвӢҶ, and every t вүҘ 2ПҖ nВІ, define ПүвӮҷ(t) вү” (П‘вҖІ(t) вҲ’ log n) вҒ„ (П‘вҖІ(t) + c). Then ПүвӮҷ(t) вҲҲ [0, 1).
lem:Пүbound.proof: By Edwards В§7.4 (stationary-phase saddle at t = 2ПҖ nВІ), П‘вҖІ(2ПҖ nВІ) = log n. By lem:П‘вҖі, П‘вҖІ is strictly increasing on (0, вҲһ), so П‘вҖІ(t) вүҘ log n for every t вүҘ 2ПҖ nВІ; hence the numerator is вүҘ 0. By lem:Оҳdiffeo, the denominator П‘вҖІ(t) + c is > 0. Denominator minus numerator equals c + log n > 0, so ПүвӮҷ(t) < 1.

thm:WSS.name: Time-average WSS of Y
thm:WSS.statement: The time-average covariance c[Y](О·) вү” lim рқ‘ҲвҶ’вҲһ рқ‘ҲвҒ»В№ вҲ«вӮҖбөҒ Y(u) Y(u+О·) du exists for every О· вҲҲ в„қ, is positive-definite, and is continuous at 0. In particular c[Y](0) = 2.
thm:WSS.proof: Change of variable u = Оҳ(t), du = ОҳвҖІ(t) dt gives вҲ«вӮҖбөҒ Y(u)ВІ du = вҲ« from 0 to ОҳвҒ»В№(U) |Z(t)|ВІ dt. By ax:HL, вҲ«вӮҖбөҖ |Z(t)|ВІ dt = T log(TвҒ„(2ПҖ)) + рқ“һ(T). By lem:Оҳdiffeo and ax:ПҲasymp, U = Оҳ(T) = П‘(T) + c T = (TвҒ„2) log(TвҒ„(2ПҖ)) + рқ“һ(T), hence UвҒ»В№ вҲ«вӮҖбөҒ YВІ du вҶ’ 2. For general О·, apply ax:RS to write Y(Оҳ(t)) Y(Оҳ(t)+О·) = (ОҳвҖІ(t) ОҳвҖІ(t + Оҙ[О·](t)))вҒ»В№бҗҹВІ Z(t) Z(t + Оҙ[О·](t)), where Оҙ[О·](t) вү” ОҳвҒ»В№(Оҳ(t)+О·) вҲ’ t = О· вҒ„ ОҳвҖІ(П„) for some П„ between t and t + Оҙ[О·](t) (mean value theorem). Split Z(t) Z(t + Оҙ[О·](t)) into diagonal (m = n, Пғ = ПғвҖІ), antidiagonal (m = n, Пғ = вҲ’ПғвҖІ), off-diagonal (m вү  n), and remainder cross-terms. The diagonal term (n, Пғ) contributes (1вҒ„U) вҲ‘вӮҷвүӨвӮҷвӮҚвӮңвӮҺ (1вҒ„n) вҲ« cos(О· ПүвӮҷ(t)) dt, which converges by lem:Пүbound and bounded convergence to a finite limit A(О·). The antidiagonal, off-diagonal, and remainder terms are рқ“һ(U) times o(1) by integration-by-parts applied to their oscillatory phase slopes (вүҘ 2П‘вҖІ(t) вҲ’ рқ“һ(1) for Пғ вү  ПғвҖІ, and вүҘ ВҪ |log(mвҒ„n)| for m вү  n), together with CauchyвҖ“Schwarz on the R cross-terms. Positive-definiteness: c[Y] is a CesГ ro limit of positive-definite kernels, which is positive-definite. Continuity at 0: |c[Y](О·) вҲ’ c[Y](0)|ВІ вүӨ c[Y](0) В· (c[Y](0) вҲ’ в„ң c[Y](О·)) вҶ’ 0 via the explicit diagonal series.

cor:Bochner.name: Bochner spectral measure Ој[Y]
cor:Bochner.statement: There is a finite non-negative Borel measure Ој[Y] on в„қ with c[Y](О·) = вҲ« eвҒұбө‘бөқ dОј[Y](ОІ) and Ој[Y](в„қ) = c[Y](0) = 2.
cor:Bochner.proof: Bochner's theorem applied to c[Y] (positive-definite and continuous at 0 by thm:WSS).

def:KT.name: Windowed Fourier transform K[T]
def:KT.statement: K[T](Ој) вү” (2ПҖ)вҒ»В№ вҲ«вӮҖбөҖ Z(t) вҲҡ(ОҳвҖІ(t)) eвҒ»вҒұбөҗб¶ҝвҒҪбө—вҒҫ dt = (2ПҖ)вҒ»В№ вҲ« from 0 to Оҳ(T) Y(u) eвҒ»вҒұбөҗбөҳ du.

thm:bandlim.name: Band-limit
thm:bandlim.statement: For every c > cвӢҶ and every Ој вҲҲ в„қ with |Ој| > 1,   lim рқ‘ҮвҶ’вҲһ 2ПҖ |K[T](Ој)|ВІ вҒ„ Оҳ(T) = 0.
thm:bandlim.proof: Insert ax:RS into def:K[T] and substitute u = Оҳ(t). The (n, Пғ)-mode of the main sum contributes рқ“ҷвӮҷ,Пғ(T, Ој) вү” вҲ« from uвӮҷ to Оҳ(T) GвӮҷ,Пғ(u) eвҒұбҙҫвҒҪбөҳвҒҫ du, where uвӮҷ вү” Оҳ(2ПҖ nВІ), GвӮҷ,Пғ(u) = xвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ with x вү” ОҳвҖІ(ОҳвҒ»В№(u)), and PвҖІ(u) вү” Пғ ПүвӮҷ(ОҳвҒ»В№(u)) вҲ’ Ој. By lem:Пүbound, |PвҖІ(u)| вүҘ |Ој| вҲ’ 1 =: О» > 0 for |Ој| > 1. Write QвӮҷ,Пғ,Ој(u) вү” GвӮҷ,Пғ(u) вҒ„ PвҖІ(u) = xВ№бҗҹВІ вҒ„ PМӮ(x), with PМӮ(x) вү” (Пғ вҲ’ Ој) x вҲ’ Пғ (c + log n); Q is a rational function of x alone (no П‘вҖі enters). A single integration by parts gives рқ“ҷвӮҷ,Пғ = Q В· eвҒұбҙҫ вҒ„ i evaluated from uвӮҷ to Оҳ(T) вҲ’ вҲ« QвҖІ(u) eвҒұбҙҫвҒҪбөҳвҒҫ вҒ„ i du, so |рқ“ҷвӮҷ,Пғ| вүӨ 2 sup |Q| + вҲ« |QвҖІ(u)| du. On [uвӮҷ, вҲһ), x вүҘ ОІвӮҷ вү” ОҳвҖІ(2ПҖ nВІ) and |PМӮ(x)| вүҘ О» x, hence |Q(u)| вүӨ О»вҒ»В№ ОІвӮҷвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ. For the derivative, dQвҒ„dx = (вҲ’(Пғ вҲ’ Ој) x вҲ’ 2Пғ (c + log n)) вҒ„ (2 xВ№бҗҹВІ PМӮ(x)ВІ), and the bound |dQвҒ„dx| вүӨ ((|Ој|+1) вҒ„ (2О»ВІ)) xвҒ»ВібҗҹВІ + ((c + log n) вҒ„ О»ВІ) xвҒ»вҒөбҗҹВІ follows from |PМӮ(x)| вүҘ О» x. Change of variable u вҶҰ x with duвҒ„dx = 1вҒ„П‘вҖі(ОҳвҒ»В№(u)) > 0 (lem:П‘вҖі) yields вҲ« from uвӮҷ to вҲһ |QвҖІ(u)| du = вҲ« from ОІвӮҷ to вҲһ |dQвҒ„dx| dx вүӨ ((|Ој|+1) вҒ„ О»ВІ) ОІвӮҷвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ + (2(c + log n) вҒ„ (3О»ВІ)) ОІвӮҷвҒ»ВібҗҹВІ. Since ОІвӮҷ вүҘ c + log n, the ОІвӮҷвҒ»ВібҗҹВІ term is вүӨ (2 вҒ„ (3О»ВІ)) ОІвӮҷвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ. Therefore |рқ“ҷвӮҷ,Пғ(T, Ој)| вүӨ CвӮҒ(c, |Ој|) ОІвӮҷвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ with CвӮҒ(c, |Ој|) вү” 2О»вҒ»В№ + (|Ој|+1) О»вҒ»ВІ + (2вҒ„3) О»вҒ»ВІ. The RiemannвҖ“Siegel remainder contributes вҲ« R(t) вҲҡ(ОҳвҖІ(t)) eвҒ»вҒұбөҗб¶ҝвҒҪбө—вҒҫ dt; by ax:RS, (dвҒ„dt) arg R(t) = рқ“һ(tвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ), so for large t the total phase slope Ој ОҳвҖІ(t) + (dвҒ„dt) arg R(t) is вүҘ |Ој| c вҒ„ 2, and integration by parts yields a uniform рқ“һ(TвҒ»В№бҗҹвҒҙ) contribution. Summing over n вүӨ N(T) = рқ“һ(TВ№бҗҹВІ): |K[T](Ој)| вүӨ CвӮҒ вҲ‘вӮҷвӮҢвӮҒбҙәвҒҪбөҖвҒҫ nвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ ОІвӮҷвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ + рқ“һ(TвҒ»В№бҗҹвҒҙ) = рқ“һ(TВ№бҗҹвҒҙ вҒ„ вҲҡ(log T)) (using ОІвӮҷ вүҘ c + log n). Since Оҳ(T) вҲј (TвҒ„2) log T, 2ПҖ |K[T](Ој)|ВІ вҒ„ Оҳ(T) = рқ“һ(TвҒ»В№бҗҹВІ вҒ„ (log T)ВІ) вҶ’ 0.

cor:supp.name: supp Ој[Y] вҠҶ [вҲ’1, 1]
cor:supp.statement: The Bochner spectral measure Ој[Y] is supported in [вҲ’1, 1].
cor:supp.proof: By ax:Wiener29, Ој[Y](E) = lim рқ‘ҮвҶ’вҲһ (2ПҖ вҒ„ Оҳ(T)) вҲ«вӮ‘ |K[T](m)|ВІ dm for every bounded Borel E вҠӮ в„қ. For E вҠӮ вҰғ|m| > 1вҰ„, thm:bandlim gives pointwise vanishing of the integrand, and dominated convergence (the integrand is uniformly bounded) gives Ој[Y](E) = 0. Countable additivity extends to Ој[Y](вҰғ|m| > 1вҰ„) = 0.

thm:Yentire.name: Y extends to an entire function of exponential type вүӨ 1
thm:Yentire.statement: Y extends to an entire function on в„Ӯ with |Y(z)| вүӨ вҲҡ2 В· e|бөҺб¶»| for every z вҲҲ в„Ӯ.
thm:Yentire.proof: Apply ax:PW with П„ = 1 and Ој[f] = Ој[Y]. The hypotheses are: supp Ој[Y] вҠҶ [вҲ’1, 1] (cor:supp) and Ој[Y](в„қ) = 2 (cor:Bochner). The conclusion gives |Y(z)| вүӨ вҲҡ2 В· e|бөҺб¶»|.

thm:Yzeros.name: All zeros of Y are real
thm:Yzeros.statement: Every zero z вҲҲ в„Ӯ of the entire extension of Y satisfies z вҲҲ в„қ.
thm:Yzeros.proof: Y is real on в„қ (def:Y). By thm:Yentire, Y is entire of exponential type вүӨ 1. By cor:supp, Ој[Y] is supported in [вҲ’1, 1] вҠҶ [вҲ’2, 2]. Apply ax:Akhiezer with П„ = 1: Y вҲҲ рқ“ӣрқ“ҹ and every zero of Y is real.

thm:RH.name: All zeros of the Hardy Z-function are real
thm:RH.statement: Every zero of Z is real.
thm:RH.proof: By lem:Zfact, Z(t) = вҲҡ(ОҳвҖІ(t)) В· Y(Оҳ(t)). By lem:Оҳdiffeo, Оҳ is a bijection в„қ вҶ’ в„қ with ОҳвҖІ > 0, so вҲҡ(ОҳвҖІ(t)) вү  0 and Оҳ(t) is real. Hence Z(t) = 0 iff Y(Оҳ(t)) = 0. By thm:Yentire, Y is entire of exponential type вүӨ 1, PaleyвҖ“Wiener band-limited with spectrum in [вҲ’1, 1] (cor:supp); by thm:Yzeros (AkhiezerвҖ“LaguerreвҖ“PГіlya), every zero of Y is real. Composing with Оҳ gives that every zero of Z is real.

meta.author: Stephen Crowley
meta.notation: Unicode math throughout: в„Ӯ в„қ в„‘ в„ң О¶ П‘ Оҳ О“ ПҲ Оҫ Ој Пғ ПҒ ОІ Оі О· Оө О» ПҖ П„ вҲ« вҲ‘ вҲҸ вҲҲ вҲү вҠӮ вҠҶ вҠҮ вүӨ вүҘ вү  вүЎ вү” вҲһ вҲҡ вҲӮ вҲҳ вҲ§ вҲЁ вҲҖ вҲғ в„• рқ“ӣ рқ“ҹ рқ“ҷ рқ“һ вҒ°В№ВІВівҒҙвҒөвҒ¶вҒ·вҒёвҒ№вҒәвҒ»вҒјвҒҪвҒҫвҒҝбөғбөҮб¶ңбөҲбөүб¶ бөҚК°вҒұКІбөҸЛЎбөҗбө’бө–КіЛўбө—бөҳбөӣК·ЛЈКёб¶» бө§бөЁбө©бөӘбөҰ вӮҖвӮҒвӮӮвӮғвӮ„вӮ…вӮҶвӮҮвӮҲвӮүвӮҠвӮӢвӮҢвӮҚвӮҺ вӮҗбөҰб¶ңбөўвұјвӮ–вӮ—вӮҳвӮҷвӮ’вӮҡбөЈвӮӣвӮңбөӨбөҘвӮ“ ВјВҪВҫв…“в…”в…ӣв…ңв…қв…һ
